steps.observed: HTTP 200 with error: 'Email and password sign up is not enabled' (EMAIL_PASSWORD_SIGN_UP_DISABLED)
HTTP 200 with error: 'Email and password is not enabled' (EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED)

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email -> 200 (error body: EMAIL_PASSWORD_SIGN_UP_DISABLED), POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 200 (error body: EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED)

VAL-SHELL-010.issues: Cannot access dashboard/chat — Better-Auth config missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }. Dashboard redirects to /sign-in, and both sign-up and sign-in endpoints reject email/password auth.

VAL-SHELL-011.issues: Cannot test message sending — auth is broken, dashboard inaccessible. Additionally, OPENAI_API_KEY is likely not set, so AI responses would fail even if auth worked.

steps.observed: Line 4: import { streamText } from 'ai'; streamText() called with model, messages, tools; result.toUIMessageStreamResponse() returns streaming response
Confirmed: streamText creates streaming response, toUIMessageStreamResponse() converts to UI stream

codeInspection: chat-interface.tsx:12 — const { messages, sendMessage, status, error } = useChat()
route.ts (streamText call) — streamText({ model: openai('gpt-4o-mini'), messages, tools: {...} })

steps.action: Run pnpm build with env vars
steps.observed: Exit code 0, all 3 packages built successfully (3 cached)

steps.expected: All pages and API routes compiled

evidence.output: Tasks: 3 successful, 3 total. Compiled successfully. 13/13 static pages generated. Routes include /, /api/chat, /dashboard, /dashboard/chat, /sign-in, /sign-up.

steps.observed: Both sign-up and sign-in endpoints reject email/password auth

VAL-CROSS-004.issues: Cannot test end-to-end chat flow — auth is broken (emailAndPassword not enabled in Better-Auth config), and OPENAI_API_KEY is likely not set.

steps.action: Inspect route.ts for Effect runtime usage
steps.expected: ManagedRuntime from Effect used to compose and run services
steps.observed: makeRuntime from @nivalis/utils creates two runtimes: chatConfigRuntime (for OpenAI key validation via ChatConfigLive layer) and firecrawlRuntime (for Firecrawl service via FirecrawlLive layer)
All present: ChatConfig = Context.GenericTag<ChatConfigShape>('ChatConfig'), ChatConfigLive = Layer.effect(...), Config.string('OPENAI_API_KEY'), ChatConfigError extends Data.TaggedError

steps.expected: Runtime.runPromiseExit used to run Effect programs
steps.observed: chatConfigRuntime.runPromiseExit(ChatConfig) validates API key; firecrawlRuntime.runPromiseExit(Effect.gen(...)) runs Firecrawl in tool execution

steps.action: Inspect route.ts for tools parameter in streamText
steps.expected: At least one AI connector registered as a tool
steps.observed: tools object passed to streamText contains 'scrapeWebPage' tool

steps.action: Verify tool references Effect service from @nivalis/ai
steps.expected: Tool uses an AI connector service
steps.observed: scrapeWebPage tool imports FirecrawlService from @nivalis/ai, runs it through firecrawlRuntime.runPromiseExit(Effect.gen(function* () { const firecrawl = yield* FirecrawlService; return yield* firecrawl.scrape(url); }))

steps.action: Verify Vercel AI SDK tool() pattern
steps.expected: tool() from 'ai' package with description, inputSchema, execute
steps.observed: tool({ description: 'Scrape a web page...', inputSchema: z.object({ url: z.string().url() }), execute: async ({ url }) => { ... } })

codeInspection: route.ts — tools: { scrapeWebPage: tool({ description: '...', inputSchema: z.object({ url: z.string().url() }), execute: async ({ url }) => { ... } }) }
route.ts — Tool execute function: firecrawlRuntime.runPromiseExit(Effect.gen(function* () { const firecrawl = yield* FirecrawlService; return yield* firecrawl.scrape(url); }))

frictions.description: Better-Auth config is missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }, causing all email/password auth endpoints to reject requests. This blocks all dashboard-dependent testing.

blockers.description: Auth endpoints (sign-up and sign-in) return 'Email and password sign up is not enabled' / 'Email and password is not enabled'. Better-Auth emailAndPassword plugin is not enabled in auth config. Cannot authenticate to access protected dashboard routes.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried both sign-up (POST /api/auth/sign-up/email) and sign-in (POST /api/auth/sign-in/email) — both rejected with EMAIL_PASSWORD_DISABLED error codes.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-SHELL-012, VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-007, VAL-CROSS-008), 3 blocked (VAL-SHELL-010, VAL-SHELL-011, VAL-CROSS-004 — auth broken, dashboard inaccessible).
